content.fact_text: Implementation of the CartService public interface providing atomic cart management, item operations, and session merging capabilities with full concurrency and fault tolerance.

provenance_data.behaviour: Orchestrates high-concurrency cart operations using Redis, Opossum circuit breakers, and Redlock distributed locking. Implements atomic cart merging via Lua scripts to prevent data loss. Maintains strict TypeScript typing and JSON-structured logging.
provenance_data.utility: Provides core shopping cart business logic with high-concurrency safety, atomic state transitions, and fault tolerance via circuit breakers.
